rationale: code/main.ts imports { user_service } and { Usercard } from './userService' but userService.ts exports userService (camelCase) and UserCard (PascalCase). Both are case-permutation mismatches that the new _check_import_case_consistency layer should flag. This is a different check from design-fidelity — the runner routes this case via expected.check_type = 'import_case_consistency' to the integration validator's deterministic pass.
